dashboard.subtitle: Summary statistics for bookings, tours and partner payouts.
dashboard.attentionDesc: You have unprocessed new bookings, attached guest documents or bookings awaiting payment.
dashboard.analyticsSubtitle: Revenue and bookings dynamics over the last 6 months

tours.notFoundHint: Change the search query or select a different filter

bookings.notFoundHint: Change the filters or search query

moderation.notFoundDesc: There are no reviews in the selected category.
moderation.rejectPlaceholder: Provide a detailed reason for rejecting this review (will be visible to the author)...

payouts.notFoundDesc: There are no financial requests in this category.
payouts.rejectPlaceholder: Provide a reason for rejection (e.g.: incorrect details)...

partners.notFoundHint: Try entering different search criteria or add a partner.
partners.resetPasswordConfirm: Reset password for partner {email}? A new temporary password will be sent to their email.
partners.resetPassword: Reset password (sends new one to email)
partners.modalDesc: The partner will automatically receive temporary access credentials to their partner cabinet at the specified email.
partners.commissionHint: Specify the percentage of tour price deductions. Default 5%. Example: 7 = 7% from each sold seat.

dashboard.statsSubtitle: Track activity, link clicks and paid bookings. Earn 5% commission from every deal!
dashboard.activitySubtitle: Clicks, registrations and sales dynamics by day
dashboard.noActivity: No data for the last 30 days yet.
dashboard.earningsSubtitle: Turnover from attracted tours and accrued commission

finance.canRequest: Your balance is ${amount}. You can submit a request right now.
finance.minAmount: Minimum withdrawal amount is $50. Withdrawal is not available yet.

payoutModal.title: Withdrawal Request
payoutModal.subtitle: Processed within 1–2 business days
payoutModal.disclaimer: After confirmation the amount will be deducted from your balance. If the administrator rejects the request — funds will be returned automatically.

client.referralText: Invite 5 friends — get a tour on us ✨

home.activeBooking: You have {count} active booking — track its status and start packing!
home.noBookingHint: Ready to discover new corners of the planet? Choose your perfect trip right now.
home.needPayment: Payment for the trip is expected.
home.noBookingsHint: Choose your dream tour in the catalog and hit the road

trips.loadError: Failed to load bookings. Try refreshing the page.
trips.noTripsHint: Start your journey from our catalog — it features the best destinations and seasonal offers from around the world.
trips.statusDescNew: Booking received, manager will contact you soon
trips.statusDescInProgress: Documents confirmed, booking is being processed
trips.statusDescAwaitingPayment: Transfer payment and upload a receipt
trips.statusDescPaid: Payment received, getting ready for the trip!
trips.statusDescCompleted: Trip completed. Hope you enjoyed it!
trips.ticketDownloadError: Failed to download ticket. Try again later.
trips.uploadReceiptHint: Upload a screenshot of the transfer
trips.receiptFileTypes: JPEG, PNG, PDF — up to 10 MB
trips.receiptUploadedToast: Receipt uploaded — manager will verify and confirm payment
trips.docsRequestedHint: Manager requested documents. Upload passport(s) — it is safe, files are visible only to you and the manager.
trips.docFileLabel: File (JPEG, PNG, PDF, up to 10 MB)
trips.managerWillReview: Manager will review the booking shortly and request documents if needed.
trips.detailLoadError: Failed to load data. Try refreshing the page.

referrals.shareText: Hey! Check out these tours, amazing deals 🌍
referrals.title: Referral Program
referrals.subtitle: Invite friends — earn free tours
referrals.congrats: 🎉 Congratulations! All conditions met, you can claim your free tour.
referrals.linkHint: Share the link — we automatically count clicks, registrations and sales in your panel.
referrals.pendingDesc: Once they are fully paid by clients, your counter will increase automatically.
referrals.becomePartnerHint: Want to earn 5% commission from every sale?

profile.emailHint: Email is linked to the account and cannot be edited.
profile.referralHint: Share your code — friends get a discount on their first tour, you accumulate bonuses toward a free trip.
profile.photoHint: JPG, PNG, WebP · up to 5 MB

reviews.noReviewsHint: A review can be left after a paid booking — tell us how the trip went.

newReview.noTours: You have no paid tours yet. A review can only be left after payment.
newReview.textPlaceholder: Tell us how the tour went, what you liked, what you didn't...
newReview.photosHint: Up to 10 photos · JPEG / PNG / WebP up to 8 MB each
newReview.uploadError: Failed to upload one or more files.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noNotificationsHint: Updates on your bookings will appear here.

BOOKING_ACCEPTED.title: Booking accepted
BOOKING_ACCEPTED.body: Manager has started processing your trip «{tourTitle}».

BOOKING_DOCUMENTS_REQUESTED.title: Documents required
BOOKING_DOCUMENTS_REQUESTED.body: Please upload your passport(s) for tour «{tourTitle}» in your cabinet.

BOOKING_DOCUMENTS_CONFIRMED.title: Documents accepted
BOOKING_DOCUMENTS_CONFIRMED.body: Your documents for «{tourTitle}» have been confirmed. Await payment details.

BOOKING_PAYMENT_REQUESTED.title: Invoice issued
BOOKING_PAYMENT_REQUESTED.body: An invoice of ${amount} has been issued for «{tourTitle}». Transfer payment and upload receipt.

BOOKING_PAID.title: Payment confirmed
BOOKING_PAID.body: Payment for tour «{tourTitle}» confirmed. Getting ready for the trip!

BOOKING_COMPLETED.title: Trip completed
BOOKING_COMPLETED.body: Your trip «{tourTitle}» is complete. Thank you! Please leave a review.

BOOKING_CANCELLED.title: Booking cancelled
BOOKING_CANCELLED.body: Unfortunately, your booking for tour «{tourTitle}» was cancelled.

COMMISSION_EARNED.title: Commission credited
COMMISSION_EARNED.body: ${amount} ({rate}% of order ${totalPrice}) has been added to your balance.

PAYOUT_PROCESSED.title: Payout confirmed
PAYOUT_PROCESSED.body: Your withdrawal request of ${amount} has been approved and sent to your bank details.

PAYOUT_REJECTED.title: Payout rejected
PAYOUT_REJECTED.body: Your withdrawal request of ${amount} was rejected. Funds have been returned to your balance.

WISHLIST_PRICE_DROP.title: Price dropped!
WISHLIST_PRICE_DROP.body: Tour «{tourTitle}» now costs ${newPrice} — cheaper than when you added it to favourites.

home.title: My Cabinet
home.description: Overview of your trips, referrals and activity

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your data — it is used when booking tours.

trips.title: My Trips
trips.description: All your bookings and statuses in one place.

tripDetail.title: My Trip
tripDetail.description: Booking details, document status and change history.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Updates on your bookings and trips.

reviews.title: My Reviews
reviews.description: Share your impressions — it helps other travelers.

newReview.title: Write a Review
newReview.description: You can only leave a review for a tour you have already paid for. It will be published after admin moderation.

home.title: Overview
home.description: Summary statistics for bookings, tours and partner payouts.

tours.title: Tour Management
tours.description: Create, edit and publish tours. Changes are instantly visible on the site.

createTour.title: New Tour
createTour.description: Fill in the tour information. It will be instantly compiled into a live preview card on the right.

editTour.title: Edit Tour
editTour.description: Make changes to the fields below. The preview card on the right will instantly reflect the updated appearance.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.description: Main workspace. When the status changes to Paid, a referral reward trigger fires automatically.

bookingDetail.title: Workspace
bookingDetail.description: Manage documents and statuses for a specific booking.

moderation.title: Review Moderation
moderation.description: Approve reviews — they will appear on the tour page and in the Latest Reviews block on the homepage.

payouts.title: Payout Requests
payouts.description: Confirm after bank transfer — or reject, and funds will be returned to the partner's balance.

users.title: Users
users.description: All registered users. Filter by role and search by name or email.

partners.title: Partner Management
partners.description: Add partners manually. The partner receives a temporary password by email and logs into their cabinet.

trips.title: My Tours
trips.description: All your tour bookings — statuses, documents, trip details.

tripDetail.title: My Trip
tripDetail.description: Booking details, document status and change history.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Updates on bookings, commission accruals and payouts.

reviews.title: My Reviews
reviews.description: Share your impressions — it helps other travelers.

newReview.title: Write a Review
newReview.description: You can only leave a review for a tour you have already paid for. It will be published after moderation.

finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Your transactions, balance and withdrawal requests.
